title: Mini Rose Spray, Pink Floral Cake Decoration With Flowers and Leaves, Single
features: 4 Piece Set - This 4 piece set of House of Cake pink mini rose sprays are perfect for adding to any celebration cake for a beautiful floral finish.
Wedding Cake Decorations – use this pink flower decoration to add a classy touch to a plain white wedding cake or any themed celebration cake.

Non Edible – These beautiful House of Cake pink mini rose sprays are to be removed before cake cutting but are 100% safe to be used in contact with food. Place the Mini Rose Cake Topper in a posy pic before it is inserted into the cake.
Dimensions – the overall size of each decoration is 110 mm x 50mm with stem approx. 70mm. Place the Mini Rose Cake Topper in a posy pic before it is inserted into the cake to create a bouquet effect.

Cake Decorations from a Leader in Cake Decorating - This is just one of the many quality products in the House of Cake range. Professional cake decorators worldwide rely on House Of Cake for all their cake decorating needs.
